prompt.description: The transformation intent applied to the source image.

source_artifact_id.description: Preferred PopiArt artifact ID for the source image.

image_url.description: Fallback stable image URL when no source_artifact_id exists.

strength.description: How strongly to transform the source image.

size.description: Optional exact runtime size when supported by the route.

aspect_ratio.description: Portable framing hint such as 1:1, 16:9, or 9:16.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
